aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet. That's either a green light or the calm before the incident.
aries.prophecy: The stars are silent today. Your notification badges are not. They are never silent.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Taurus energy says don't fix what isn't broken. It's broken. Still don't touch it.
taurus.prophecy: The universe recommends stillness. Your tech debt recommends panic. Only one of them will win.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Yes — Gemini will start three deployments and finish none of them. Bold strategy.
gemini.prophecy: Duality defines you today. You will open 14 tabs. You will close 13 of the wrong ones.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Your gut says no. Trust your gut. Your gut has seen things production has not.
cancer.prophecy: Emotions run deep today. So does the stack trace. Neither has a clear bottom.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leo deploys loudly and with flair. The post-mortem will be equally theatrical.
leo.prophecy: All eyes are on you today. Your PR still has 0 reviewers. Eyes, but make it selective.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — Virgo has reviewed the diff six times. Ship it. You will review it again after shipping.
virgo.prophecy: Precision is your gift today. You will spend it adding a trailing comma to a config file.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — Libra cannot decide. Libra will still not have decided by EOD. Tomorrow, same.
libra.prophecy: Balance calls to you today. Tabs vs spaces. You open the PR. You close it. You open it again.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Something feels off. It is off. You don't know what yet. That's the problem.
scorpio.prophecy: You sense danger in the logs today. You are correct. You are always correct. No one listens.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Sagittarius ships first and reads the docs later. Classic. Eternal. Unchanged.
sagittarius.prophecy: Adventure beckons today. So does a README last updated in 2019. You will ignore both.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Capricorn will ship, document it, write the post-mortem preemptively, and still miss lunch.
capricorn.prophecy: Hard work pays off today. Your sprint has 34 points. It is Sunday. You checked Jira anyway.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Aquarius is already thinking about the next project. This one isn't deployed yet.
aquarius.prophecy: Innovation flows freely today. You will rewrite the function in a language no one else on the team knows.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Pisces is in flow state. Do not disturb. Do not deploy. Just vibe.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. So are you. Your Slack status says 'in a meeting.' You are not in a meeting.
